cn.releaseNotes: Fixed a bug where the telephoto camera of the new iPhone 17 Pro was wrongly displayed as 5x instead of the 4x.
cn.description:
Transform Your iPhone into a Professional Long Exposure Camera with Even Longer

Unleash your creativity and capture stunning long exposure photos right from your iPhone with Even Longer. Whether you’re a professional photographer or an enthusiastic amateur, this app offers four incredible capture modes to elevate your photography:

Capture Modes:

	•	Frame Averaging Mode: Create beautiful motion blur with ease.
	•	Light Trails Mode: Perfect for capturing dynamic light movements.
	•	Star Trails Mode: Achieve unmatched quality in star trails photography with advanced algorithms that reduce disturbances like airplanes.
	•	Night Mode (PRO members only): Experience shutter speeds up to 30 times longer than any other third-party camera app, reaching up to 30 seconds (or 10 seconds on older devices).

Go PRO for Even More Features:

Unlock the full potential of Even Longer with our optional PRO membership, which includes:
	•	RAW Support: Available for all modes (except some ultra-wide cameras).
	•	Intervalometer: Capture time-lapse sequences with precision.
	•	Parallel Bracketing: Achieve perfect long exposures with multiple shots.
	•	Save Interim Results: Choose the best shot from multiple captures.
	•	Lossless TIFF Support: Preserve the highest quality in your photos.
	•	Exclusive Night Mode: Push the limits of your night photography.

Even Longer allows for a total capture time of up to 24 hours, giving you the flexibility to capture every moment, from seconds to hours. For the best results, use a tripod to ensure your long exposure images are sharp and stunning. If you’re exploring intentional camera movement (ICM) photography, you can experiment without a tripod for creative effects.

Get Started Today:
Transform your iPhone into a powerful long exposure camera and elevate your photography with Even Longer. Set your capture time from 1 second to several hours and see the difference.

Download Even Longer now and start capturing the world in a whole new light!

cn.description:
墨墨记忆卡 可以帮助你科学高效地规划需要记忆的知识，对抗遗忘。

- 可以把知识编辑成卡片，目前支持文字、图片、声音。

- 可以把自己的知识卡片分享给朋友，也可以搜索他人的卡片进行学习。

- 可以把知识卡片加入记忆规划，墨墨记忆卡 会为你安排合适的时间进行复习。

- 可以查看自己的记忆数据：遗忘曲线、记忆持久度、每日学习情况。

- 可以每日签到，见证自己的坚持和成长。

墨墨科技多年以来一直专注于记忆领域的探索，基于对 1300+ 亿条用户记忆行为数据的研究和统计，绘制了 3000+ 万条不同用户的遗忘曲线，协助用户高效规划自己的记忆。

cn.releaseNotes: • Wipr Extra improvements on many websites
cn.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

hk.description:
Thumper是一款節奏暴力遊戲：經典動作、猛烈的速度和野蠻的肉體衝撞。你是一隻太空甲蟲，勇敢闖入虛無空間，對抗巨大的首腦。

藉由特別的便攜版，讓你一手掌握九個史詩級別。

向前邁進，掌握新動作，並在可怕的魔王戰中倖存下來。被衝擊原聲推動，你會感受到每一個破碎的影響。要達到共鳴，你必須征服節奏地獄。

■特點■
·氣密一觸式控制
·肖像和風景皆為流暢的60 FPS
·九個史詩級別
·刺激的魔王戰
·迷幻視覺效果和原創配樂
·PLAY+模式（增加挑戰難度和速度）
·在iPhone X上以全螢幕顯示
·iCloud 同步

■請注意■
無線耳機會造成顯著的音頻延遲。為了獲得最佳體驗，強烈建議使用有線耳機或音響。

mo.description:
歡迎使用 AMood，你的 Apple Watch 上健康生活好夥伴。無感追蹤你的心理狀態和身體壓力，快捷查看睡眠、基礎代謝、飲水、咖啡因攝入等健康指標，幫助你掌握身體動態，探索更美好的健康生活。

◎ AMood如何幫助到你

在這個快節奏的時代，我們常常像陀螺一樣不停旋轉，卻忽視了傾聽內心的聲音。疲憊與焦慮悄然襲來，卻難以言說原因。我們相信，了解身心狀態是每個人找到理想生活節奏的關鍵。AMood 正是秉持這一理念，透過更精準的分析，幫助你更好地照顧自己。例如：

- 當你忙於趕專案，連續工作數小時，軟體會透過手錶提醒你身體活力下降，泡杯熱茶，活動一下身體；

- 當你開完一整天的會議，感到焦慮不安時，軟體同樣會提醒你情緒指數偏低，讓你意識到需要暫時停下來，也許走出去曬曬太陽，散散步，都是不錯的選擇；

- 早晨醒來感到鬱悶，打開軟體發現情緒指數偏低，原來昨晚的睡眠品質不佳。今天可能需要多曬曬太陽或者中午小睡一會，讓身心重新煥發光彩；

- 查看本週趨勢，發現每次與好友一起運動後，情緒指數都會明顯上揚。這或許是生活給我們的一個小提示：快樂往往藏在簡單的事物中；

- 當工作壓力大時，查看身心狀態日曆，尋找最適合自己的黃金時段。在對的時間做對的事，讓效率與健康齊頭並進。

◎ 核心功能

過去，壓力常透過單一的 HRV 指標衡量，但生活遠比數字複雜。AMood 首創雙維度分析，獨立監測身體壓力和心理狀態，幫助您更精準地識別身心變化，找到最適合的調節方式。

- 雙維監測：獨立追蹤身體活力與情緒波動，提供更精準的分析

- 全域數據：整合睡眠、心率、體溫、日照、步態等資訊，全面了解身體狀態

- 智慧提醒：即時監測身心狀態變化，適時提醒休息與調整

- 趨勢洞察：幫助您發現最佳作息與工作節奏

- 習慣養成：記錄運動、飲水、咖啡因攝入等行為，助力健康管理

- 聯名主題：多個 IP 正版授權，增添健康管理的樂趣與互動

AMood 不僅關注單一時刻，更致力於發現生活中的規律。透過分析睡眠、心率、體溫等多維數據，描繪出你獨特的生命韻律。每一組數據背後，都蘊藏著提升生活品質的秘密。因為我們深信，照顧自己這段旅程，理應充滿溫暖與愉悅。

◎ 蘋果健康整合

AMood 與 Apple Health 整合，需要授予蘋果健康的讀取和寫入權限。

◎ 訂閱價格和條款

我們提供一次性購買、按月和按年自動續訂三種不同的購買選項。按月或按年訂閱的說明：確認並支付後，將透過你的蘋果 iTunes 帳號自動續訂。扣費成功後，順延一個訂閱週期。若需退訂，請在當前訂閱期結束前至少24小時內，手動在 iTunes / Apple ID 設定管理中關閉自動續費功能。試用期內，如不取消訂閱，則會在試用期結束時自動開通訂閱並扣款。本服務由您自助選擇是否取消，若您選擇不取消，將為您開通下一個計費週期的續費服務。

◎ 隱私保護

使用者健康數據僅儲存在本地以及使用者所屬的 iCloud 中。

◎ 免責聲明

AMood 不是醫療設備，不能用於診斷、治療、預防疾病或醫療狀況，所提供的所有資訊和建議不可以被視作醫療建議或診斷，請勿替代專業的診斷和治療。因此，如果您擔心自己的身體和（或）心理健康，請諮詢醫生。

◎ 使用者協議和隱私條款

使用者協議 https://docs.amood.app/terms-of-use
隱私條款 https://docs.amood.app/privacy-policy

mo.description:
在台湾和日本鐵路線上駕駛電車並載客。

・簡單的益智遊戲
“東京電車２”是一款規則簡單的益智遊戲。無需專業知識。
火車迷，遊戲迷，人人都能享受。

・致所有將成為行動調度員的人
在日本的早晨，顧客們正在等待火車的到來去上班。
讓我們啟動火車並運送客戶。

- 遊戲目標
日本鐵路公司是營利性組織。讓我們以高營業利潤為目標吧！

・如何產生利潤
票價收入-出發成本=營業利潤。

票價收入是在車站的顧客登上火車時產生的。
示例）如果兩名乘客在票價為 20 的車站上車，他們將獲得 40。

發車費按發車時的車廂數收取。
示例）2 節車廂的火車為 30，4 節車廂的火車為 40，10 節車廂的火車為 70。


一個人可以乘坐一輛車。
票價收入是在乘客登上火車時產生的。
調整行駛距離和車輛數量以獲得最大利潤。
離境費用。如果你開的火車太多，而佔用率下降，你就會損失收入。

·操作方法
控制非常簡單，規則也很簡單。
你所要做的就是調整列車的車廂數量，讓列車在最佳時間出發。
隨著遊戲的進行，將會出現各種變化，例如特快列車和換乘站。

·體積
享受 50 多條路線。
請體驗日本鐵路公司的各種運輸策略。

- 沒有廣告，沒有計費
沒有應用內購買。無廣告。
請專心玩遊戲。孩子們可以安心地玩耍。
讓我們分享在 社交媒體 上駕駛的結果。

・鐵路玩
JR東日本、JR東海、JR西日本、JR九州、東武、東急、西武、京王、京急、京阪、阪急、阪神、近鐵、名鐵、小田急、南海、西鐵、相鐵、京成、東京地鐵、大阪地鐵、都營地鐵, 筑波快遞

・容量約130MB
存儲負擔也小。根本沒有繁重的處理。

Take on the role of a person trapped inside their dream. This place is filled with a mix of memories and nightmares. To get out, you have to open a small door.

Immerse yourself in the game's history, walk through many endings, and discover the key secret.
NAS music player，Support protocol: webdav, navidrome, subsonic, aliyundrive, emby

Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

tw.description:
Transform Your iPhone into a Professional Long Exposure Camera with Even Longer

Unleash your creativity and capture stunning long exposure photos right from your iPhone with Even Longer. Whether you’re a professional photographer or an enthusiastic amateur, this app offers four incredible capture modes to elevate your photography:

Capture Modes:

	•	Frame Averaging Mode: Create beautiful motion blur with ease.
	•	Light Trails Mode: Perfect for capturing dynamic light movements.
	•	Star Trails Mode: Achieve unmatched quality in star trails photography with advanced algorithms that reduce disturbances like airplanes.
	•	Night Mode (PRO members only): Experience shutter speeds up to 30 times longer than any other third-party camera app, reaching up to 30 seconds (or 10 seconds on older devices).

Go PRO for Even More Features:

Unlock the full potential of Even Longer with our optional PRO membership, which includes:
	•	RAW Support: Available for all modes (except some ultra-wide cameras).
	•	Intervalometer: Capture time-lapse sequences with precision.
	•	Parallel Bracketing: Achieve perfect long exposures with multiple shots.
	•	Save Interim Results: Choose the best shot from multiple captures.
	•	Lossless TIFF Support: Preserve the highest quality in your photos.
	•	Exclusive Night Mode: Push the limits of your night photography.

Even Longer allows for a total capture time of up to 24 hours, giving you the flexibility to capture every moment, from seconds to hours. For the best results, use a tripod to ensure your long exposure images are sharp and stunning. If you’re exploring intentional camera movement (ICM) photography, you can experiment without a tripod for creative effects.

Get Started Today:
Transform your iPhone into a powerful long exposure camera and elevate your photography with Even Longer. Set your capture time from 1 second to several hours and see the difference.

Download Even Longer now and start capturing the world in a whole new light!

- 可以把知识编辑成卡片，目前支持文字、图片、声音。

- 可以每日签到，见证自己的坚持和成长。

墨墨科技多年以来一直专注于记忆领域的探索，基于对 1300+ 亿条用户记忆行为数据的研究和统计，绘制了 3000+ 万条不同用户的遗忘曲线，协助用户高效规划自己的记忆。

	•	Save Interim Results: Choose the best shot from multiple captures.
	•	Lossless TIFF Support: Preserve the highest quality in your photos.

Even Longer allows for a total capture time of up to 24 hours, giving you the flexibility to capture every moment, from seconds to hours. For the best results, use a tripod to ensure your long exposure images are sharp and stunning. If you’re exploring intentional camera movement (ICM) photography, you can experiment without a tripod for creative effects.

Get Started Today:
Transform your iPhone into a powerful long exposure camera and elevate your photography with Even Longer. Set your capture time from 1 second to several hours and see the difference.

Download Even Longer now and start capturing the world in a whole new light!

pt.description:
RadarScope is an AMS-award-winning weather visualization tool that empowers meteorologists, public safety officials, storm spotters, and weather enthusiasts to view a full suite of single-site radar data and related severe weather products. Your initial purchase provides professional radar visualization in a fully native app, free from distracting and invasive practices, with optional subscription packages to add even more capabilities.

Whether you’re scanning for a mesocyclone’s tell-tale hook echo, pinpointing the landfall of a hurricane’s eye wall, or identifying velocity couplet, hail spike, or debris ball signatures, RadarScope displays native radar data in its original radial format. You see what the radar sees almost as soon as the radar sees it, with automatic updates every two to ten minutes depending on the radar’s scanning strategy.

Your initial app purchase includes the following:

• Full suite of single-site radar products for the US, Canada, Guam, Denmark, Finland, and Germany
• 6-frame radar loops
• Two built-in providers for radar data
• Tornado, thunderstorm, flash flood, marine, snow squall, extreme wind, tropical, and other warnings in the US
• Selected severe weather warnings in Canada and Australia
• NWS-generated storm tracks with hail, TVS, and mesocyclone attributes
• Inspector and distance tools
• Color palette options for radar data
• AllisonHouse data plan integration
• Spotter Network integration for storm and location reporting
• mPING integration for submitting weather reports to NSSL
• Bundled maps with political boundaries, water bodies, and major highways, optimized for low-bandwidth use
• Support for widgets and complications
• Universal app for Apple platforms, including Apple Watch and Apple TV
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier One is an optional annual subscription that adds more features for tracking severe weather:

• 30-frame radar loops
• Cloud-to-ground lightning strikes
• Severe weather watches in the US and Canada
• Special weather statements in the US and Canada
• Mesoscale convective and precipitation discussions
• SPC convective, tornado, hail, wind, and fire outlooks
• WPC excessive rainfall outlooks in the US
• Local storm reports in the US
• Custom color palette support
• Multi-pane display (2 on phones; 4 on larger devices)
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier Two is an optional annual or monthly subscription that transforms RadarScope into a more complete visualization tool for a larger suite of weather products, including:

• Everything in Pro Tier One
• 50-frame radar loops
• A third provider for US radar data
• NEXRAD Level II radar data for the US with a 30-year historical archive
• Historical NEXRAD Level III, super-res, and non-US radar data with a 30-day archive
• Historical NWS bulletins with a 19-year archive
• GOES East and GOES West satellite products
• NSSL’s Multi-Radar Multi-Sensor (MRMS) products
• NCEP’s Real-Time Mesoscale Assimilation (RTMA) products
• Surface observations
• Atmospheric soundings in the US
• Hail size, hail probability, and azimuthal shear contours with a 30-day archive
• More detailed transportation and satellite imagery maps
• Custom color palette support for GOES, MRMS, and RTMA
• Server-sent events for radar and warning updates
• Cross-platform subscription sharing on up to 5 devices
• Family sharing support

If you choose to buy a RadarScope Pro subscription, it will be charged to your App Store account. The subscription will be auto-renewed within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the same price you originally paid. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal disabled via your App Store account settings after the purchase. Once purchased, the subscription cannot be canceled during the active subscription period.

DTN is committed to safeguarding your privacy online. Our privacy policy is available for review at https://www.dtn.com/privacy-policy/

Please visit our web site for more information.

Conduzir comboios e transportar passageiros em linhas férreas japonesas.

・Simple jogo do cérebro
O "Train Dispatcher!2" é um jogo do cérebro com regras simples. Não é necessária perícia.
Treinar fãs, fãs de jogos, todos podem apreciá-lo.

・To todos os que se tornarão um despachante de comboios
De manhã, no Japão, os clientes aguardam a chegada do comboio para irem trabalhar.
Vamos iniciar o comboio e transportar os clientes.

・Goal do jogo
As empresas ferroviárias japonesas são organizações com fins lucrativos. Apontemos para um elevado lucro operacional!

・How para ter lucro
Receitas tarifárias - Custo de partida = lucro operacional.

As receitas tarifárias são geradas quando os passageiros embarcam numa estação.
Exemplo) Se dois passageiros embarcarem num comboio numa estação com uma tarifa de 20, a companhia recebe 40.

Os custos de partida são cobrados de acordo com o número de vagões quando o comboio parte.
Exemplo) 30 para um comboio de 2 carruagens, 40 para um comboio de 4 carruagens, e 70 para um comboio de 10 carruagens.

Uma pessoa pode andar num vagão.
As receitas das tarifas são geradas quando os clientes embarcam no comboio.
Ajustar o horário de condução e o número de veículos de modo a obter o maior lucro.
Custos de partida. Se correr demasiados comboios e a taxa de ocupação baixar, perderá receitas.

・How para operar
O jogo é muito fácil de operar e as regras são simples.
Tudo o que tem de fazer é ajustar o número de vagões e fazer com que os comboios partem no melhor momento.
À medida que o jogo avança, várias variações, tais como comboios expresso e estações de transferência, irão aparecer.

・Volume
Desfrute de mais de 50 rotas.
Por favor, experimente a grande variedade de estratégias de transporte das empresas ferroviárias japonesas.
Sem anúncios, sem taxas.

・No anúncios, sem facturação
Por favor, concentrem-se no jogo. As crianças também podem desfrutar do jogo.
Partilhe os seus resultados no Redes sociais.

Linhas de comboio com as quais pode brincar
JR Japão Oriental JR Tokai JR Japão Ocidental JR Kyushu Tobu Tokyu Seibu Keio Keikyu Keihan Hankyu Hanshin Kintetsu Meitetsu Odakyu Nankai Seitetsu Sotetsu Keisei Tokyo Metro Osaka Metro Toei Metro Tsukuba Express

・Capacity é cerca de 130MB
A carga de armazenamento também é pequena. Não há qualquer processamento pesado.
